final_prompt: A cozy indoor setting features a single rustic wooden table with prominent grain and texture, centered in front of a window that allows soft natural light from the left to gently illuminate the scene. On the table are two distinct bouquets of vibrant red roses, each adorned with lush green leaves and tied neatly with a white satin ribbon. The ribbons elegantly drape over the sides of the bouquets, adding a graceful touch. The background showcases a softly blurred view of the window frame and a neutral-colored wall, enhancing the serene and intimate atmosphere. The lighting creates subtle shadows on the right side of the table, highlighting the rough, weathered wood grain. The rose petals exhibit a smooth, velvety texture, while the white ribbon has a glossy sheen. The dominant color palette includes warm tones from sunlight, deep red roses, green leaves, white ribbon, and rustic brown wood, contributing to the overall tranquil and inviting ambiance.
prompt_before: A cozy indoor setting features a rustic wooden table with visible grain and texture, positioned in front of a window that allows soft natural light to illuminate the scene from the left. On the table are two separate bouquets of vibrant red roses, each with lush green leaves and tied neatly with a white satin ribbon. The ribbons hang gracefully over the sides of the bouquets. The background includes a blurred view of the window frame and a neutral-colored wall, maintaining the serene and intimate atmosphere of the original setting. Style reference: Lighting quality and direction: soft natural light coming from the left window, creating gentle shadows on the right side of the table; Surface materials and textures: rough, weathered wood grain of the table; smooth, velvety texture of the rose petals; glossy sheen of the white ribbon; Dominant color palette: warm tones from sunlight, deep red roses, green leaves, white ribbon, and rustic brown wood; Overall atmosphere: serene, intimate indoor setting with a focus on the floral arrangement.

constraints: There is one rustic wooden table with visible grain and texture.
The table is positioned in front of a window allowing soft natural light from the left.
Two separate bouquets of vibrant red roses are on the table.
Each bouquet has lush green leaves.
Each bouquet is tied neatly with a white satin ribbon.
The ribbons hang gracefully over the sides of the bouquets.
The background includes a blurred view of the window frame.
The wall in the background is neutral-colored.
The lighting is soft natural light coming from the left window.
Gentle shadows are created on the right side of the table.
The table surface has a rough, weathered wood grain texture.
The rose petals have a smooth, velvety texture.
The white ribbon has a glossy sheen.
The dominant color palette includes warm tones from sunlight, deep red roses, green leaves, white ribbon, and rustic brown wood.
The overall atmosphere is serene and intimate.
